title: Machilus sharmae
taxonomy: Machilus sharmae is classified as a species of evergreen shrub or small tree in the family Lauraceae. It is a member of the genus Machilus, which is commonly known as the camphor trees. This plant is native to the Himalayan region and is often found growing in the wild. The classification of Machilus sharmae is based on its morphology, anatomy, and molecular characteristics. Further research is necessary to confirm the precise classification of this species within the Lauraceae family.
